storyboard.content: I have unusual bruises all over my body that appeared without any injury or bump that I can remember.
I have been getting nosebleeds that are very hard to stop.
My gums bleed every time I brush my teeth.
I have been getting frequent infections lately.
I have lost about 10 pounds in the past month without trying to lose weight.
I feel very tired all the time. The bleeding is happening in multiple places and is hard to control.
All of these symptoms have been developing and getting worse over the past 6 weeks.
I am a 45-year-old woman with no significant medical history and I am not on any medications.
